hero.question: DeepSeek V4 released by March 31?
hero.prob_take: The 5.7% odds suggest the crowd has effectively priced in zero chance DeepSeek ships V4 before March 31, leaving almost no room for upside even if the company makes a surprise push in the next 10 weeks. Sharp money should watch for any credible technical benchmarks or hiring announcements from DeepSeek's team, since the current price punishes conviction harder than the actual timeline warrants.

daily_take.headline: DeepSeek V4 Death Spiral: Market Panic or Rational Repricing?
daily_take.deck: DeepSeek V4 odds collapsed 36 points overnight to 5.7%, suggesting the market just realized March 31 was always a fantasy deadline. But here's the thing: if you believe DeepSeek ships anything material by EOQ, you're getting paid 18-to-1 on a plausible outcome. The smart move is asking whether this is capitulation from uninformed traders or the market finally pricing reality.

sidebar.headline: IPO announcement volume died (literally $1K traded), but the 14.5% bid signals someone knows something about Q1 filings we don't.
sidebar.label: Which Companies will IPO: 14.5%

sidebar.headline: Vitality bid up 9.5 points on fresh money, but 42.5% is still a toss-up price for a team with real form. Check their recent results before following the crowd.
sidebar.label: Vitality Wins Rotterdam: 42.5%

sidebar.headline: Anduril got hammered 22 points to 20%. Defense contractor IPO timelines are policy-dependent, not company-dependent. Worth a nibble if you have conviction on the political winds.
sidebar.label: Anduril IPO Before 2027: 20.0%
